reviews.comment:
No funciona la aplicación,  no hay señal de Internet,  un pico de combustible para los que llegan y otro para los que se vuelven. Cargar nafta en la noche evitar ir entre las 10 y las 12 y entre las 18 y 21 por largas filas de autos.

(Translated by Google)
The app isn't working, there's no internet connection, and there's a fuel peak for those arriving and another for those returning. Fuel up at night; avoid going between 10 a.m. and 12 p.m. and between 6 p.m. and 9 p.m., due to long lines of cars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXeGYzTUJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy poco personal en la atención sobre todo si es finde largo creo que deberían para ese caso reforzar el personal 4 cuadras para cargar combustible los baños sucios no te brindan servicio de duchas tienen un cámping hermoso sin habilitar señores recuerden que reciben turistas brinden un servicio como la gente sino no se pongan estación de servicio pongan estación de carga de combustible a medias es lamentable

(Translated by Google)
Very little staff in service, especially if it's a long weekend. I think they should reinforce the staff in that case. 4 blocks to fill up with fuel. The bathrooms are dirty. They don't provide shower service. They have a beautiful, unequipped campsite. Gentlemen, remember that they receive tourists. Provide service like the people do. Otherwise, don't set up a service station. Set up a half-service fuel station. It's regrettable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXc2MtS1NBEAE

muy linda estación de servicio y muy buena la atención como el bufé la atención del vendedor extraordinario

(Translated by Google)
Very nice service station and very good service, as well as the buffet and the service from the attendant was outstanding.
